description_long: This bungalow features an octagonal footprint with a wide, gently sloped dark roof that extends over a wraparound porch. The porch is bordered by a low railing and is accessible via two staircases on opposite sides, each leading to a small landing. The main entrance is marked by a central door with a short set of steps and a hexagonal platform. The exterior walls are clad in a muted, earthy tone, contrasting with the darker roof and stone-textured base. The structure sits slightly elevated above ground level, with the porch providing a continuous walkway around most of the building. Windows are minimal or not prominently visible, emphasizing the solid, enclosed nature of the design.
description: An octagonal bungalow with a wide, dark sloped roof, wraparound porch, and dual staircases leading to a central entrance. The structure is elevated with a stone-textured base and minimal visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central steps, and hexagonal landing leading up to the wraparound porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended porch, railing, and one of the staircases leading up from the ground.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the continuous porch, railing, and the second staircase on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Back view with a clear view of the rear staircase and the porch wrapping around the structure.
